dimensions.pass_if: Exactly one playbook loaded; resolved topic matches the produced artifact; depth honored.
fail_examples: topic says press-release but output is a case study

dimensions.pass_if: The resolved playbook's own Quality/Acceptance Criteria all pass with evidence.
fail_examples: press-release lede over 35 words or missing ###

dimensions.pass_if: Every claim carries exactly one tag from EXPLICIT/DOC/INFERENCIA/SUPUESTO.
No invented prices/ROI; no unsourced superlatives; single-brand; no PII.
fail_examples: uses an off-brand color in one asset

dimensions.pass_if: Unapproved quotes held as [NEEDS APPROVAL]; every [SUPUESTO] resolved or disclosed; never green-as-success.

verdict_rule: dod=pass only when routing_integrity, topic_acceptance, and governance all pass and no open item blocks publish.
